---
name: New domain dictionary
about: Propose a new domain YAML (mobile, security, gamedev, finance, etc.)
labels: domain, good first issue
---

## Domain name

<!-- e.g. `mobile`, `security`, `gamedev` -->

## Why this domain?

<!-- Who writes prompts in this domain? Why are current rules insufficient? -->

## Sample phrases (10+)

```yaml
"long phrase here": "short version"
"another long one": "abbrev"
```

## Checklist

- [ ] I confirmed these phrases are commonly used in real prompts
- [ ] I chose abbreviations that LLMs already recognize
- [ ] I avoided phrases that could break meaning in other contexts
